title: Editorial Portrait AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Adult afternoon loungewear editorial portrait focused on fabric, quiet rest, and window light. Subject: adult woman with soft mature features and loose chestnut hair, realistic skin texture, fully adult presentation. Outfit: champagne satin slip under a long cream knit robe, fully covered editorial styling; show satin sheen, robe knit texture, robe belt fold, and lace edge detail. Pose: seated sideways on a linen window bench with eyes closed and one hand resting naturally on the robe belt; calm rest, not seductive bed posing. rest pose: seated sideways on a linen window bench with eyes closed and one hand resting on robe belt. Scene: quiet hotel room window bench with folded blanket, linen curtain, and made bed in background, clean domestic styling. Lighting and Palette: warm afternoon side light with gentle shadow stripes; champagne, cream, beige, warm gold. Camera: vertical 9:16 premium lifestyle editorial, tasteful crop, soft focus falloff, realistic lens perspective. fabric focus: satin sheen, robe knit texture, robe belt fold, lace edge detail. Restrictions: adult subject only, no lingerie ad framing, no vulgar erotic feeling, no direct sexual pose, no messy bed fantasy, no distorted hands, no plastic skin.
